page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web server tool that provides prediction of disulphide bonding connectivity patterns without the prior knowledge of the bonding states of cysteines. Useful in locating disulphide bridges and helping to solve protein folding.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web server tool that provides prediction of disulphide bonding connectivity patterns without the prior knowledge of the bonding states of cysteines. Useful in locating disulphide bridges and helping to solve protein folding.
